hero.name: Raphael Martins
hero.slogan:
I enjoy creating tools
that make life easier for people.

about.title: About
about.intro: I'm a Full-Stack Software Engineer with over 20 years of experience developing digital solutions focused on performance, automation, and real impact.
about.work: I work as a freelancer for companies and startups that need more than just a dev: they need someone who thinks like a founder and executes like an engineer.
about.skills: Expert in PHP (Laravel), Vue.js (Nuxt 3), TypeScript, REST APIs, AI automation, WhatsApp integrations (Evolution API), Technical SEO, and DataLayer (GA, GTM). MVPs in weeks, direct communication, business-focused deliveries.
about.experience: Worked on large-scale e-commerce (Casa Bahia / Via Varejo, Infracommerce / Unilever), developed platforms for insurance (DQR Tech / Coris) and fintechs (Fisoft / Valuin). Completed The Cloud Bootcamp (AWS, Azure, GCP) and have experience with Docker, GitHub Actions, VPS, and serverless architectures.
about.products: Today I build my own SaaS products: Rateio Justo (100% serverless with Hono + Vercel), DOPA Check (habit tracking with WhatsApp), Trady.chat (trading diary + AI), and iAssistente.online (AI agents via messaging).
about.trading: In the financial market, I developed MQL5 bots for MetaTrader 5 and features with real-time market analysis. Advanced English.

items.description: On-demand solutions development. Own SaaS with Laravel and Nuxt, AI and messaging integrations
Legacy PHP 7.4 system, SQL Server and Azure for travel insurance sector (Coris)
Complete front-end of Valuin.app in Nuxt 3 (TypeScript, Composition API)
Compra Food Service e-commerce (Unilever). Vue.js, jQuery, PHP, MySQL

items.company: Via Varejo / FCamara — Sr. Fullstack Developer
items.description: Casa Bahia: Tag manager, affiliate scripts, mobile site AngularJS/TypeScript. Award-winning features

rateiojusto.name: Rateio Justo
rateiojusto.description: Mobile-first serverless webapp for fair bill splitting item by item. 100% serverless architecture on Vercel with geolocation via Google Places, optional AI text parser, and PIX payment.

dopacheck.name: DOPA Check
dopacheck.description: Mobile-first web platform for habit tracking and challenges with quick check-ins, visual progress dashboard, and WhatsApp integration. 68% completion rate vs 23% market average.

tradychat.name: Trady.chat
tradychat.description: Complete platform for traders with 3 integrated products: Trading Diary (voice narration in Pro version), Smart Economic Calendar (AI + alerts 5min before critical events), and B3 Real-time Quotes Grid.

iassistente.name: iAssistente.online
iassistente.description: Pioneer concept of AI Agents via messaging created at the beginning of the LLM hype (2022-2023). The idea was to offer intelligent agents operating via WhatsApp/API for conversational automation. Project pivoted after massive AI evolution made it less differentiated.

contact.title: Let's Work Together?
contact.description: I'm always open to new projects and opportunities. If you have an idea or need help with development, get in touch!

footer.manifesto: Building > Planning · Doing > Thinking · Freedom > Status
